TraceEvent fields: event_id,session_id,agent_id,event_type(start|finish|log),timestamp,mandate,status(running|done|error|skip),findings(dict),summary,parent_id,duration_ms.","trace_loader.py":"build_node_states(events)->{agent_id:{status,last_seen,sessions,summary,findings,duration_ms}}. build_session_edges: parent_id->edges. as_json_snapshot for HTTP.","otel_exporter.py":"SpiderWebSpanExporter: gen_ai.agent.name fuzzy->registry ID, start+finish per span, captures tokens/model/errors.","otel_setup.py":"configure_spider_web_tracing(): Simple+Spider exporter + optional AITK OTLP Batch(gRPC:4317/HTTP:4318). DashboardPanel pattern.","T2":"FileSystemWatcher on .devsteps/cbp/**/*.json -> map target_subagent via TS _ROLE_MAP -> postMessage snapshot to webview.","T3":"Port registry.py as static TS constants (webview/spiderWeb/registry.ts). No Python needed.","T4":"mandateResultsProvider.ts scans .devsteps/cbp/ -> mandateCardsRenderer stat-card HTML in DashboardPanel.","T5":"Extension host fetches http://localhost:7890/api/traces (no CSP issue) on 2s interval, postMessages snapshot."}}
recommendations: Port registry.py as static TS file (webview/spiderWeb/registry.ts): AGENTS, EDGES, SPOKE_COLORS, RING_COLORS. Eliminates Python dependency entirely.
Bundle D3 v7 into dist/ via esbuild. Reference via webview.asWebviewUri(dist/d3.min.js). Satisfies VS Code CSP no-CDN constraint.
Add devsteps.showSpiderWeb command in package.json + SpiderWebPanel.ts (DashboardPanel pattern). _update() injects TS topology into D3 HTML with getNonce CSP.
Wire vscode.workspace.createFileSystemWatcher on .devsteps/cbp/ and .devsteps/analysis/. Map target_subagent via TS _ROLE_MAP, postMessage TraceEvent snapshots.
Add mandateResultsProvider + mandateCardsRenderer to DashboardPanel. Scan .devsteps/cbp/*.mandate-result.json, emit stat-card HTML with existing CSS vars.
